title: Setup Wizard
welcomeDesc: Get started by setting up your organization with a guided setup wizard.

steps.welcome: Welcome to the platform. This wizard will guide you through the initial setup.
steps.org_profile: Tell us about your organization so we can tailor the platform to your needs.
steps.frameworks: Select the compliance frameworks relevant to your organization.
steps.modules: Choose which modules you would like to activate.
steps.users: Invite team members to collaborate on the platform.
steps.templates: Apply compliance template packs to pre-populate controls and policies.
steps.sample_data: Optionally load sample data to explore the platform features.
steps.complete: Your setup is complete. You can now start using the platform.

templates.title: Template Library
templates.subtitle: Pre-built compliance template packs for quick setup
